name: Country Club At Woodmore
about: The Country Club at Woodmore is a private club located in Mitchellville, Maryland, featuring an 18-hole Arnold Palmer designed golf course. The venue offers comprehensive amenities including golf, tennis, pool, and dining facilities. It operates on a membership-only basis with various categories including Full Golf, Young Executive, Senior, Corporate, and Social memberships. The club is known for its well-conditioned course with rolling fairways, challenging greens, and spectacular views, as well as its exclusive limited membership policy ensuring easy course access.
why_golfers_like_it: Exclusive limited membership for easy course access
Comprehensive golf, tennis, and pool amenities

food_and_drink.notes: Casual and gourmet dining available in Palmer Grille and outdoor patio
Full bar service in dining facilities

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Members typically provide their own equipment, though the club may offer rental options through the pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and beverages are not permitted as the club offers full dining services in Palmer Grille and its outdoor patio.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time varies by pace of play, but typical rounds take 4-5 hours depending on course conditions and member volume.

faq.question: Is the club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The club offers family memberships and junior programs, making it suitable for families with children interested in golf and other sports.
